skills.name: Prakriti
skills.description: The spirit changes to a swamp, slowing down and giving continuous damage to enemy walking over it.
skills.effect_text:
Swamp Duration: 10 seconds
Skill Factor SkillFactor % per second
Movement Speed - CaptionRatio
Targets CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Possession
skills.description: Create a barrier around the spirit. Bind and give damage to the enemies inside the barrier.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 5 times
Cannot move for CaptionRatio second(s)
Targets CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Enira
skills.description: The spirit blows the wind of the soul to attack the enemy and pushes it away by a certain distance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 3 times
Discover more
coffee
Respiratory Conditions
Doll
Targets CaptionRatio2
Change of pushing away CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Tanoti
skills.description: Numerous chains come out of the spirit to attack the surrounding enemies and pull them by a certain chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Chance of pulling in CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Patati
skills.description: The Spirit causes a big impact on the front, damaging the enemy, and knocks the enemy down by a certain chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
Targets CaptionRatio2
Chance of Knocking down CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Moksha
skills.description: The spirit absorbs the surrounding energy and gives continuous damage to the nearby enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 15 times
Targets CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Spirit Expert
skills.description: Following effects are applied while controlling the spirit.
skills.effect_text:
Spirit Movement Speed + CaptionRatio
Spirit Duration: 10 seconds

attributes.name: Possession: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Possession] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Posession: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Possession] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Sadhu: Penance
attributes.description:
* [Penance] buff stacks every 2 seconds when in Out of Body (up to 20 stacks)

* Increases damage of Magic attack by 2% per stack

* Debuff removes when Out of Body removes

attributes.name: [Arts] Spirit Expert: Wandering Soul
attributes.description:
* Can not control the spirit anymore

* The spirit automatically goes to the enemy nearby the caster and deals a normal attack

* The spirit moves to the caster when parting over a certain distance

* Spirit duration is fixed to 3 seconds

* The skill is automatically activated when at the location of the spirit when the duration is over

* Spirit is immune to Knockback and Knockdown

* The Status Ailment of skills and increase spirit's Movement Speed effect is removed but the final damage of Sadhu's skill increases by 100%

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Prakriti: Penance
attributes.description:
* Enemy on [Prakriti] swamp receives [Penance] debuff for 60 seconds

* Final Damage of 15% is applied when inflicting critical hit to the enemy under [Penance] with Sadhu skill
